response: The 1978 movie based on a book written by a radio playwright and children's book author born in 1900 was produced by **Kraft Suspense Theatre**. This series, produced and broadcast from 1963 to 1965 on NBC, was sponsored by Kraft Foods and was seen three weeks out of every four. It was also produced by Roncom Films, the company of Perry Como's son, and was written by Joe Williams.
